RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT ZOCCA, RAFFAELE ZOCCA, MARY AS TO RESPONDENT GARCIA, JUAN SALAZAR, JORGE ORTEGA HEARING SET FOR FEB-27-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
